title: Dashboard anniversary type filtering + PDF export respects selected filter

requirements.summary: Add a Dashboard UI control to filter anniversaries by type (All/Baptism/Marriage/Funeral) and ensure filtering is server-driven with correct pagination reset behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard provides a filter control with options: All, Baptism, Marriage, Funeral.
Selecting a filter updates the list to show only the selected anniversary type (or all types when 'All' is selected).
Pagination counts and navigation reflect the filtered dataset (no empty pages caused by client-side-only filtering).
For a 2016 baptism and selectedYear = 2026, Dashboard displays '10th anniversary' (i.e., number 10), matching the Kartoteka card logic.

file_operations.description: Update anniversaries React Query hooks to support an optional anniversaryType parameter and pass it to the backend call (request object), including the type in the queryKey so pagination/totalCount/pageCount reflect server-side filtering. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add an anniversary type filter control (All/Baptism/Marriage/Funeral) in the anniversaries section header, wire it into the anniversaries query so filtering happens server-side, and reset pagination to page 1 when year or filter changes. Ensure the rendered anniversaryNumber uses the returned value (no client-side recomputation). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Make Dashboard anniversaries PDF export respect the selected year and currently selected anniversary type filter.
acceptanceCriteria: When the Dashboard filter is set to a specific type (e.g., Marriage), the exported PDF includes only Marriage anniversaries for the selected year.
When the Dashboard filter is set to All, the exported PDF includes all anniversary types for the selected year.

file_operations.description: Extend the anniversaries PDF-export query hook to accept an optional anniversaryType and request the filtered export data from the backend (request object), using a queryKey that includes year + type. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update the PDF export action to request the PDF export data via the backend actor using the selectedYear and selected anniversary type (omit type when 'All'), then generate the PDF content from the returned export dataset so the document contains only filtered entries. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

If needed for PDF formatting consistency, add/adjust helper(s) to format exported anniversaries (including type label and anniversaryNumber) without altering the underlying anniversary math (which must come from backend). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
